description: TaxMate Australia helps Australian users move from records to accountant-ready tax prep outputs with ATO-backed research, conservative treatment rules, and clear review flags for ambiguous items.

defaultPrompt: Review these tax expenses conservatively for my accountant.
interface.longDescription: TaxMate Australia turns messy tax inputs into clear, conservative preparation workflows for Australian taxpayers and ABN operators. It combines official ATO source refresh, transaction review, calculator scaffolds, and output-focused skills (workbook and taxpack) on a bash and Python runtime. It is a preparation aid, not professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, or registered-tax-agent advice, and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Australian Taxation Office.
interface.shortDescription: ATO-backed Australian tax-prep workflow for Codex

name: taxmate-australia

safety.noLodgmentBoundary: Never lodge, file, submit, transmit, or finalise any tax return, BAS, form, statement, objection, election, payment instruction, or other material with the ATO or any government agency.
